mechanics.text:
HISTORY
and honor intact  Under other circumstances Pryde might have refused but with the Wolf Khan making clear his intent to attack her Clan" holdings she could not afford leave those worlds defended by mere garrison troops_ She accepted hegira; and the Jade Falcons left Coventry without another shot being fired. The success the coalition torce Coventry taught the Inner Sphere that old enemies could bury their differences in the face common enemy: Betore the year was out; Prince Victor and other Inner Sphere leaders would act on that esson, aunching the campaign that obliterated once-mighty Clan and ended the invasion of the Inner Sphere.
Clan Steel viper suffered the most humiliating fate the   invading Clans next t0 the shattered Smoke   Jaguars_ Thinking to take advantage Jade Falcon weakness the attermath of the Refusal War; the Vipers challenged Falcon dom: inance of their shared occupation zone After their campaign of conquest failed the Vipers eft the Inner Sphere rather than be destroyed by the Falcons As the man who defeated the mosc fearsome threat the Inner Sphere had ever known Victor Steiner-Davion should have been the hero of the hour. In the eyes of many; he was but his Uwm people were not among them. The  prince had left his youngest sister; Yvonne Steiner Davion regent New Avalon his absence He returned to find Yvonne deposed and the Federated Commonwealth in the hands of Katherine Steiner- Davion . Apparently; Katherine had been plotting the takeover for years_ prelude to becoming the next First Lord of the Star League_ Even without realm however, Prince Victor remained politica force to be reckoned with; At the Second Whitting Conference , Precentor   Martial Anastasius Focht of ComStar announced his retirement and named Victor as nis successor. The new Precentor Martia used his position to vote Coordinator Theodore Kurita rather than his sister; into the post of First Lord The newborn Star League remains calm_ but tensions are simmering beneath the surface. Prince Victor has so far made no attempt to regain his lost throne, unwilling to inflict civil war on his people_ Tine fact remains however, that Precentor Martial Steiner Davion has crack military force at his dispos- al, and increasing numbers in the Federated Commonwealth are beginning t0 view him hero for his defeat of the Clans_ Archon Katherine sits uneasily on the throne of New Avalon and may yet be provoked into rash action_ Meanwhile Clans Jade Falcon ad Wolf remain committed to renewing the invasion_ Clan Wolf formally repudiated the results of the Strana Mechty Trial, and Clan Jade Falcon is unlikely to abide by a outcome so offensive t0 its pride Neither Clan has the strength t0 move in force yet, but each is rebuilding at swift pace_ The Capellan Confederation has begun military action against the indepen- dent  St. Ives Compact; intent on  recapturing it. And the Draconis Combine the  presence of the Nova Cats and the stresses of reabsorbing Jaguar-held worlds have breathed new life into reactionary movements opposed t0 the Coordinator'$ Iiberalization of Combine society. For the moment; his position remains strong: but no one can say how long that will Iast. Once again; the Inner Spnere poised   precariously between peace and war. At ay moment; the balance of power may shift, setting BattleMechs on the march and worlds ablaze.
THE STAR LEAGUE REBORN In October 3058 the leaders of the various Inner Sphere powers gathered on the Lyran capital of Tharkad accomplish peacefully what they had failed to achieve during centuries of war-_the rebirth of the Star League_ Despite the deep divisions among them the rulers of the Inner Sphere agreed join for single purpose end the Clan threat: The new Star League chose prove its strength by destroying single Clan: the Smoke Jaguars. Initially; the Star League intended only to drive the Jaguars out of their occupation zone However, information trom Clan traitor enabled them strike Smoke Jaguars' homeworld as well. Throughout 3059 and 3060 Clan Smoke Jaguar died at the hands of the Inner Sphere_ Their occupation zone overrun their homeworld in ruins and their warrior caste decimated_ the Jaguars essentially ceased to exist: The Inner Sphere force then turned its attention toward the rest of the Clans: Lacking the might to defeat the entire Clan military. Prince Victor Steiner- Davion led his forces Strana Mechty; in the heart of Clan space . There , they defeated the Crusader Clans in hard-fought Trial of Refusal. The Crusaders' defeat ended the invasion, leav ing them locked in their occupation zones Or driven trom the Inner Sphere entirely: Clan Nova Cat; which had sided with the Inner Sphere in obedience t0 the mystic visions of its leaders received its Own fiefdom in the Draconis Combine. Their fellow Clans abjured them for   their treason and seized   their   holdings Clan space. Clan Ghost Bear; which chose not to fight the Trial, has also become permanent presence in the Inner Sphere_ They now occupy the Ghost Bear Dominion, part of what was once the Free Rasalhague Republic from which they guard the Inner Sphere   against  incursions by   Crusader-minded Clans unwilling to accept defeat: What other plans they ay have remain anyone guess.
185
